summary: Cache type-candidate rendering and defer heavy diagnostics to improve formation/type candidate responsiveness.
bugClassification: render performance regression from synchronous candidate scoring and diagnostics
rootCause: Type candidate render recalculated all role rows and emitted synchronous diagnostics on each render; formation render synchronously scanned all generals/tactics for tactic-attack diagnostics.
changes: Add roleRows cache keyed by type/purpose/role/query/save signature
Suspend HadoTypeScore trace during bulk candidate scoring
Flush type-candidate diagnostics asynchronously via requestIdleCallback/setTimeout
Gate console diagnostic output behind HADO_TYPE_CANDIDATE_VERBOSE_LOGS
Combine saved candidate audit/filter into one pass
Defer formation tactic-attack full diagnostic snapshot
